assessor_raw: Card fraud detection: methodologically sound. Temporal split is mandatory for fraud detection. Chargeback-confirmed labels (90-day resolution) provide clean ground truth. Precision at fixed recall aligns with operational constraint. AUPRC secondary metric provides full curve comparison. Both models receive equivalent tuning. Ablation suite (embedding ablation, augmented baseline, SHAP interpretability) is comprehensive. Stratified performance by fraud amount and temporal stratification detect drift. Scope appropriately bounded. Verdict: defense_wins.
